title: IT Support Technician
description:
Overview

The End-User Support / Infrastructure Support Technician provides reliable, high-quality IT support with a focus on customer service, technical expertise, and timely resolution. This role involves deskside assistance, troubleshooting, and collaboration with Site Services and other IT teams (Audio Visual, Network, Server, Print).

Key Responsibilities

  • Diagnose and repair laptops, desktops, tablets, peripherals, and mobility devices (iOS/iPhone/iPad).
  • Provide IMAC (Install, Move, Add, Change) support, including office relocations.
  • Support operating systems, MS Office, business applications, and imaging devices (printers/MFDs).
  • Manage tickets in Remedy, ensuring SLA compliance and clear communication with end users.
  • Coordinate with vendors for warranty repairs and replacements.
  • Deliver VIP and home-office support.
  • Assist with compliance tasks, risk assessments, and facility inspections.
  • Provide IT support for events, meetings, disaster recovery, and emergency response.
  • Participate in rotational on-call support outside business hours.
  • Perform data center support: racking/stacking, cabling, upgrades, reboots, and incident resolution.
  • Maintain IT facilities and manage hardware inventory/logistics.
  • Liaise with vendors and support rollout of new technologies.
  • Contribute to cybersecurity, business continuity, and disaster recovery activities.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology or any related field.
  • Minimum 5 years’ experience in end-user and infrastructure support.
  • Strong knowledge of operating systems, end-user hardware, and troubleshooting.
  • Proficiency with ticketing systems and helpdesk services.
  • Familiarity with TCP/IP and network connectivity.
  • Excellent communication skills (English & local language).
  • Strong customer service orientation with a “Customer First” mindset.
  • Ability to lift/move equipment and work in data center environments.
  • Flexibility to travel and provide on-call support.
  • Technical certifications preferred.
  • Demonstrated problem-solving, adaptability, and accountability.

postedCompany.description:
HCL Technologies (HCL) empowers global enterprises with technology for the next decade today. HCL’s Mode 1-2-3 strategy, through its deep-domain industry expertise, customer-centricity and entrepreneurial culture of ideapreneurship™ enables businesses to transform into next-gen enterprises.

HCL offers its services and products through three lines of business – IT and Business Services (ITBS), Engineering and R&D Services (ERS), and Products & Platforms (P&P). Through its cutting-edge co-innovation labs, global delivery capabilities, and broad global network, HCL delivers holistic services in various industry verticals, categorized under Financial Services, Manufacturing, Technology & Services, Telecom & Media, Retail & CPG, Life Sciences, and Healthcare and Public Services.

As a leading global technology company, HCL takes pride in its diversity, social responsibility, sustainability, and education initiatives. HCL has a consolidated revenue of US$ 10.02 billion and its 159,682 ideapreneurs operate out of 50 countries. For more information, visit http://www.hcltech.com
